programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S19 : E09 Pretty White Lies
programme.desc: An officer arrests a driver who attempts to swallow drugs stashed in his mouth. An officer arrests a repeated drug offender in an area notorious for drug trafficking. An officer pulls over an unlicensed woman driver who is arrested for providing falsified identification.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S14 : E04 That’s not Chapstick
programme.desc: Deputies search a suspicious vehicle behind a strip club. A man threatens to shoot employees at a car rental company. A man tosses lip balm filled with narcotics out the window during a traffic stop.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S27 : E06 Tazed and Confused
programme.desc: Cops are forced to take desperate measures when an unruly suspect won’t stop fighting. Officers have to contain a man looking to flee with crack. Police know a tearful driver has weed in the car when he refuses to open his glove box.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S14 : E22 That’s Not Nice
programme.desc: Officers spot a suspected stolen vehicle and a pursuit ensues. Officers are called to a fight at a bar over a tossed drink. Police are called to the scene of two intoxicated siblings arguing.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E20 A Bag, a Bus and a Break In
programme.desc: A couple calls for help when a man breaks into their home. A school bus is involved in a hit and run accident. Officer find a one gallon bag of contraband in a suspect’s car.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S14 : E11 Naked Rental
programme.desc: Officers are called when a disturbed naked man covered in blood is spotted in a park. Officers find a nude couple in a U-Haul truck. A traffic stop over a minor violation turns into a dangerous pursuit.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E18 Flipped Out
programme.desc: A suspect leads police on an extended pursuit throughout New Orleans. When he’s flipped off by his neighbors, a man responds by firing a gun. Police pull over a Porsche and discover it’s stolen.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S21 : E03 Gas up and Run!
programme.desc: A man is tasered twice after struggling with two deputies. A gas station fight ends in a foot chase. A deputy pulls over a pair of quarreling lovers after they run a stop sign.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S22 : E01 He's the Gingerbread Man
programme.desc: A man wanted for unpaid child support hides from deputies. Officers respond to a sexual predator following a minor. A man with a checkered driving record crashes his car.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S22 : E29 Get a Room
programme.desc: A man claims to be protecting the car he breaks into. Officers respond when a couple gets too friendly while out in public. Police are dispatched when a drunk woman pounds on her neighbor’s door.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S28 : E04 Brotherly Love
programme.desc: A man behind the wheel of a stolen vehicle leads deputies on a wild pursuit. When a man threatens his brother with a knife, Mom calls the cops. A young couple tell deputies conflicting stories.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S13 : E02 Voo Doo Curse
programme.desc: A woman claims a man abused her then put a curse on her. Police arrest a man for having illegal drugs on him. An elderly woman locks herself in the restroom at a bank.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S23 : E12 Safe Cracking
programme.desc: A man stages a sit-in in his car in an attempt to stop it from being towed. A homeowner denies that he’s selling drugs despite the large amount of evidence found in his home. A safe full of evidence is found during a traffic stop.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S27 : E25 Scary Monsters
programme.desc: A resistant suspect thinks he sees monsters everywhere. Cops are forced to officiate a spousal wrestling match. Officers try to sort out where two motorists got their car and whose dope they possess.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S27 : E10 Running in Traffic
programme.desc: A fleeing suspect takes officers on a wild chase through oncoming traffic. Surveillance footage of a stabbing helps police find the vicious attacker. Cops track a subject into an uncooperative stranger’s apartment.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S22 : E08 Poolwatch
programme.desc: Deputies tase a man who almost ran over a deputy with his truck. A man gives police false information after saving a boy who fell into a pool. A woman tries to buy drugs from an undercover officer.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S27 : E05 Put Your Clothes Back On
programme.desc: Cops try desperately to get an unclothed man to cooperate. After a chase with a pickup truck, officers find a 14-year-old in the driver’s seat. On a routine traffic stop, police contend with a plethora of dope and even more lies.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S13 : E18 Momma's Boy
programme.desc: The suspect of a carjacking tells an Officer that he would rather go to jail than face the wrath of his mother. An Officer investigates a domestic call involving a husband, wife and a lamp. A slow speed pursuit ensues and the suspects are booked for felony, eluding, and drugs.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S19 : E06 Life Changing Moment
programme.desc: An officer attempts to pull over a man on a bicycle who refuses to stop. An officer arrests two suspects involved in a drug deal who attempt to discard the evidence. An officer questions a driver leaving a known drug area.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S25 : E14 Jawbreaker
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, officers stop to talk to a young woman who appears to be soliciting prostitution. A father accuses his son of breaking his jaw. While running from officers, a suspect attempts to drop evidence on the street.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S22 : E09 Gimme a Break
programme.desc: Officers pursue two brothers after an attempted bank robbery. A confused man with a shotgun calls police after hearing voices. A man asks deputies for a break after they find illegal items in his truck.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S14 : E21 On the Run
programme.desc: Officers pursue two suspects on foot who fled from a stolen vehicle. A drunk driver is pulled over after a brief chase. Officers receive a call for help from a juvenile about an attempted break-in.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S26 : E02 Who Let the Dogs Out
programme.desc: Officers deploy a police K-9 when a burglary suspect takes refuge in a lemon tree. A suspect on the run seeks shelter in a stranger’s house. A biker with a suspended license just doesn’t know how to listen.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S16 : E05 Kiss & Make Up
programme.desc: Officers question a couple looking to score. Officers respond to a domestic violence call in which it is unclear what exactly transpired. Officers assist on a shots fired call.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S27 : E24 Not My Crack
programme.desc: An uncooperative suspect obeys instructions from his more levelheaded relative. A dead ringer for “The Rock” uncovers some crack rock. Officers try to get the truth out of two known drug users.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S19 : E01 Liar, Liar
programme.desc: Officer ends up in a foot pursuit after pulling over a suspicious vehicle with expired tags. A recovering addict is caught with drug paraphernalia in her backpack. A man is served an arrest warrant for sexual battery.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E12 Pour One Out
programme.desc: Rather than stop, a driver decides to lead police on a high-speed chase. A woman is shot at by her ‘sugar daddy.’ A fleeing suspect dumps a suspicious liquid out of his window.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S13 : E33 Tuscon Tussle
programme.desc: Officers respond to an armed robbery and carjacking, the suspects are arrested on several charges. A concerned sister reports a fight between her brother and a heavyset burglar. Officers pursue a stolen vehicle and a high speed chase ensues which ends in a wreck.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S27 : E20 Sucker Punch
programme.desc: A suspect goes out to get his haircut and winds up in jail. Officers try to piece together a puzzling street fight between a boxer and his confused friend. Cops give a suspect every chance to admit to his obvious crime.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S21 : E33 Hiding the Evidence
programme.desc: A drug dealer swallows something suspicious as deputies move in to arrest him. Deputies pull over a father with his son in the car. A woman files a kidnapping report against her own boyfriend.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S14 : E24 I’m With You Guys
programme.desc: A man involved in a drug deal claims he works for the task force. An irate woman slams the front door when Officers arrive. Police pull over two young suspects in an area known for drug activity.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S23 : E22 And Through the Woods
programme.desc: Officers chase a fleeing suspect as he runs through the woods and into a rose bush. An elderly man puts himself in the middle of a knife fight. Two brothers disagree over letting officers search their car.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S21 : E13 Wardrobe Malfunction
programme.desc: A suspect flees police in a truck over a misdemeanor traffic warrant. A man denies hitting his wife who has a bloody nose. A man denies ownership of his shorts when deputies find drugs in them.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E05 You're Not Banksy
programme.desc: Officers get a tip and locate the suspect in a recent shooting. A woman is questioned when she is found parked alone in her car behind closed businesses. Officers respond to a call involving juveniles spray painting an electrical box.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E10 Wearing My Crime
programme.desc: A suspect flees from police and attempts to hide contraband from them. A driver is pulled over and is literally covered in his crimes. An employee of a cell phone store attempts to scam the police and her employers.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S13 : E25 Dark Trailer Park
programme.desc: Police investigate a possible abduction at a trailer park. A man in a stolen truck is pulled over and Officers discover washed checks and drug paraphernalia. A suspect is arrested after abandoning a stolen vehicle behind a fast food restaurant.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S19 : E12 Dumbfounded
programme.desc: Officers conduct a traffic stop and the vehicle’s occupants are taken into custody. An officer investigates a suspicious vehicle occupied by two women who turn on each other during questioning. An informant tips authorities off about drug activity at a shady motel.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S14 : E15 Graveyard Shiftiness
programme.desc: Officers detect a strong odor of marijuana during a routine traffic stop. A woman tells Officers her inebriated boyfriend smashed a window. Police investigate a suspicious vehicle parked behind a cemetery.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S13 : E29 Hard Ticket
programme.desc: A man throws out his narcotics during a foot-chase with police. A woman is arrested for possession of drug paraphernalia. Officers call for back-up after a woman is held at knife-point.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S16 : E02 Bourbon and Blood
programme.desc: A man assaults another man for groping his girlfriend. Police make several drug-related arrests while patrolling New Orleans. An adventurous suspect is arrested while scaling down a drainpipe.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S25 : E01 Midnight Ride
programme.desc: Officers stop a man riding a bicycle in the middle of the street with no backlight. Suspects have a fun night out in a neighborhood known for drugs. Officers are dispatched to help a woman when her boyfriend threatens her with a brick.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S27 : E31 Getting Funky
programme.desc: Unhappy about getting stopped for drinking while biking, a man takes off on foot. A woman in her PJs doesn’t know how she wound up in a stolen vehicle. Officers discover a couple smoking Meth in front of a young child.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S16 : E01 Running Amok
programme.desc: An assailant attacks a woman after bumping into her. A woman is arrested for spilling beer on a cameraman’s equipment. Two intoxicated women are placed under arrest after a physical altercation.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S19 : E18 Tit for Tat
programme.desc: A suspect bails out of his vehicle when a car chase reaches a dead-end. An officer responds to a domestic disturbance call and recommends that the quarreling couple get a divorce. Officers investigate a suspected drug transaction.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S29 : E14 Clueless
programme.desc: A young lawbreaker does everything she can to escape jail. Grandpa saves the day when Mom fails to do the right thing. A traffic stop leads one deputy to suspect an elderly duo of criminal activity.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S15 : E09 Crazy as a Loon
programme.desc: Officers conduct a traffic stop on a vehicle that ran a stop sign. Officers retrieve birds from a fireplace and release them outside. Officers conduct a drug-reversal-buy sting to capture buyers.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S28 : E01 Cats and Dogs
programme.desc: An armed trespasser uses a young dog as a shield. A woman under the influence goes on a rampage, tearing into homes and people. A cat lady calls the cops when her neighbors get nosy.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S23 : E10 Crawling to Vegas
programme.desc: A driver leads police on a slow speed chase towards Las Vegas. Three people are suspected of using contraband. A multi-neighbor dispute devolves into a fight involving guns and bats.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S21 : E23 Check Please!
programme.desc: Deputies confront an intoxicated man who threatened a restaurant owner. A man tells officers he can assault who he wants. Officers are called to an altercation over a sleeping bag and a backpack.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S13 : E14 If the Shoe Fits
programme.desc: Two suspects wreck their vehicle while attempting to evade police in a hot pursuit. Officers respond to a domestic dispute involving neighbors. A suspect abandons his truck and shoes while running from Officers.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S16 : E21 I Want Charges
programme.desc: An officer is attacked while attempting to break up a fight. Officers confiscate marijuana during a routine traffic stop. A man is arrested for domestic abuse.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S13 : E26 Bail Fail
programme.desc: During a routine traffic stop, an Officer recognizes the passengers from a prior drug related arrest. A K-9 unit assists in the pursuit of a grand theft auto suspect who flees on foot. An arrest is made after a couple leaving a known drug house is pulled over and questioned.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S21 : E34 Blame my Man
programme.desc: A man runs from police claiming he heard a gunshot. A woman lays the blame on her boyfriend. Officers confront a man who refuses to come down from a roof.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S21 : E27 Alleycat
programme.desc: Officers search for a runaway suspect with a weapons charge. A man admits to having a large number of drugs during a traffic stop. Officers respond to a man with a gun in an alley.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S28 : E12 Smooth Move
programme.desc: A suspected copper thief plays dumb when the cops catch up to him. A jittery cyclist tries to get away with a slippery maneuver. A couple takes their bout of domestic violence to the streets.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S28 : E02 Sittin’ in the Dark
programme.desc: Cops nab a suspect who tries to escape by hiding in plain sight. A man fires away when he believes his dog is in danger. Paramedics are called for a distraught woman and her catatonic partner.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S29 : E24 Odd Man Out
programme.desc: A man has a heart-pounding experience and requires medical assistance. A lawbreaker can't seem to grasp the gravity of her situation. It’s two against one when the cops question an interesting trio.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S28 : E19 Second Time Around
programme.desc: Deputies are shocked when they recognize a repeat offender. When confronted by the cops, a desperate man shows no love for his girlfriend. Officers bring in a canine unit to complete a vehicle search.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S21 : E21 Beer Run
programme.desc: A carjacking results in a chase and a flipped vehicle. Suspects crash a truck after attempting to steal beer. A man attempts to swallow his drugs during a bust.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S25 : E06 Unusual Party Favors
programme.desc: A suspect giving an officer his identification has a change of heart and drives away. It’s not a party in Kansas City unless people are shooting off guns. Officers are called when two suspects are spending hours parked at a Chevron.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S22 : E21 Undercover Blues
programme.desc: Police work a sting that targets drug dealers. An undercover sting discovers narcotics trafficking. Police respond to a burglary in progress and discover a flop house.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S16 : E30 Ransacked
programme.desc: An officer subdues a young man in mental duress. Officers stop a suspicious vehicle and find drug paraphernalia inside the woman's car. Officers respond to a robbery in progress.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S29 : E08 British Invasion
programme.desc: A desperate trespasser attempts to give the cops the slip. A frightened man tries to get the attention of deputies and takes the wrong approach. Officers show that a little honesty can go a long way.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S16 : E04 Drive Thru Blues
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call reporting an officer-involved fight. A brazen driver careens into a ditch after failing to yield. A berserk woman is pulled over for her erratic driving.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S21 : E35 My BFF Screwed Up
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call of a woman holding a loaded gun to her head. Officers kick in a door to halt an assault in progress. A woman driving a stolen vehicle claims it was purchased by a friend.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S21 : E19 Memory Loss
programme.desc: A man on parole dumps a stolen car and flees from officers on foot. A man denies stealing a wallet from a car with a smashed window. A hostile woman gives officers a false name.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S15 : E08 An Unfortunate Cycle
programme.desc: Officers arrange a sting to capture bicycle thieves. An Officer conducts a traffic stop on a vehicle with fraudulent tags. An officer stops a vehicle after witnessing a prostitute get inside.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S22 : E14 She Needed a Nap
programme.desc: Deputies pursue a man involved in a carjacking. Deputies are called to an altercation between a father and son. Officers respond to an unresponsive woman lying in a roadway.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S13 : E06 Hide and Seek
programme.desc: Undercover Officers organize a buy-bust sting. Racoons hide out in a woman's chimney. A man gets pulled over for soliciting a prostitute.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S14 : E16 Where There’s Smoke
programme.desc: Officers engage in a high-speed pursuit of a stolen vehicle. Police spot a motel fire, alert the guests and contact the Fire Department. Officers pursue a suspect on a stolen motorcycle.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S26 : E14 Fast Food Escape
programme.desc: When officers approach, a suspect flees into a fast food restaurant. A driver takes his granny's wheels for a dangerous spin with cops in pursuit. Sheriffs catch up to a man who fled the scene of a possible domestic battery.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S29 : E33 Running Scared
programme.desc: Suspected jewelry thieves attempt a daring escape during a high-speed pursuit. A feisty man’s arrest proves a challenge. A traffic stop leads to a marital spat after it reveals some illegal items.

programme.desc: Carl Super Truck i jego gadżety na ratunek! Gdy mieszkańcy Car City potrzebują pomocy, ten superbohater wkracza do akcji.

programme.title: Making Pizza with Bebefinn!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Making Pizza with Bebefinn!
programme.desc: Pineapple pizza or chocolate pizza? It’s time for the Bebefinn family’s special pizza-making adventure! What do you think it will taste like? Let’s use our imagination!

programme.title: Boo and Mandoo
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Boo and Mandoo
programme.desc: Meet Boo the cat and Mandoo the puppy! They’re always bickering—but can they become friends? Maybe a game of ball will bring them closer!

programme.title: Learn Colors with Toy Cars
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Learn Colors with Toy Cars
programme.desc: Pinkfong’s toy car friends have disappeared! Let’s learn colors with Hogi and find Pinkfong’s car friends together!

programme.title: Pinkfong Wonderstar
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Episode 5
programme.desc: Codi decides to make a Bumbleberry Pie for sad Rachel. But...what is Bumbleberry? What does it look like? We heard that it's amazingly delicious… Coco's poetry went missing! With the help of Wonderstar, Coco finds the whereabouts of the disappeared manuscripts. Wait...is that Pat the goat, who is eating paper...? Would Pat be the culprit?

programme.title: Pinkfong Wonderstar
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Episode 6
programme.desc: Pinkfong and Hogi are invited to a dance party. Pinkfong is super excited but Hogi is so nervous.The night has come and a suspicious sound comes out from Wonderstar's house! Catch the thief! What? It's Hogi practicing dance! Wonderville is in danger! Pinkfong and Hogi figure out that there was something wrong with Poki's pancake machine. Stop it before the whole village is covered with pancakes!

programme.title: Learn ABC with Baby Shark
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Learn ABC with Baby Shark
programme.desc: Elasmosaurus, Ankylosaurus, Tyrannosaurus, Ouranosaurus, Allosaurus, Baryonyx, Gallimimus, Ichthyosaurus

programme.title: Dance Adventure
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Episode 2
programme.desc: Arrr-! Are you ready for a fun adventure? Come and let's sing and dance together! Arrr-!

programme.title: Bebefinn
programme.sub-title: S04 : E10 Bebefinn 4 Ep10
programme.desc: Baby Finn Learns Something New Everyday with the Funn Family! Here comes another beautiful precious day of Finn, a Baby Shark lover just as our children, and his Family. Enjoy the daily life of the Bebefinn Family filled with joyful songs.

programme.title: Learn Colors with Hogi
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Episode 7
programme.desc: Learn colors with Hogi and Wonderville Friends.

programme.title: Kikipuppup
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Episode 1
programme.desc: Meow Meow, Woof Woof! Bickering Again Today! Meet the cute rivals, Kiki & Puppo— and… Vex! A fun story about a cute cat and dog, sharing little laughs, heartwarming moments, and tiny bits of growing up every day!

programme.title: Bebefinn Weather Song
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Bebefinn Weather Song
programme.desc: What’s the weather like today? Sunny, rainy, windy, or snowy—there are so many kinds of weather to explore! Let’s learn all about weather with Bebefinn!

programme.title: The Shark Family's Teeth Hurt!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 The Shark Family's Teeth Hurt!
programme.desc: Oh no! Mommy Shark has cavities, Daddy Shark has a broken tooth, and Big Brother Shark’s teeth have turned yellow! Doctor Baby Shark and friends are here to help make them healthy again!

programme.title: Happy Birthday to 100 Friends
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Episode 1
programme.desc: It’s birthday time! All birthday friends, gather around! Bebefinn, Bora, and Brody are here to celebrate each and every one of you!

programme.title: Pinkfong Dinosaur Musical Stories
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Episode 2
programme.desc: Did you know that dinosaurs love to sing and dance?

programme.title: Pinkfong Songs for Children
programme.sub-title: S01 : E36 Everyday Items Songs
programme.desc: Shall we learn how to apply and use life tools safely with Pinkfong? Fashionable pencil master, marching mask, elegant ballet teacher, reliable medicine ranger, stylish scissors butler, and even cute spoons and forks! With tools friends, anyone can learn in a fun and easy way!

programme.title: Police Car Song and more
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Episode 1
programme.desc: Watch brave Police Car saving the day! You're watching "Police Car Rescue Team Special", a fun and exciting Police Car Songs & Story compilation presented by Pinkfong!

programme.title: Pinkfong Dance and More
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 ABC Dance
programme.desc: With our new series, kids will enjoy learning the alphabet.

programme.title: We are Construction Vehicles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 We are Construction Vehicles
programme.desc: Oh no, the bridge has collapsed! Let’s head to the construction site with Hoi and his team of construction vehicles!

programme.title: Baby Shark: I Love You Super-Duper!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Baby Shark: I Love You Super-Duper!
programme.desc: I love you, I love you, I love you! Let’s share Baby Shark’s love for family! Sing along and count from one to ten together!

programme.title: Bebefinn Dino finger
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Bebefinn Dino finger
programme.desc: Wow! There's Tyrannosaurus Rex coming out of TV!

programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Ninimo Animal Songs
programme.desc: Pinkfong's new friend Ninimo! Shall we sing animal songs together?

programme.title: Mystical Fairy Tales with Pinkfong
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Episode 2
programme.desc: Help! Pinkfong and Ninimo! Fun and creepy happenings in classic fairy tales! Join Pinkfong and Ninimo on a thrilling journey through the creepy world of timeless fairy tales!

programme.title: Bebefinn
programme.sub-title: S02 : E03 Episode 3
programme.desc: Baby Finn Learns Something New Everyday with the Funn Family! Here comes another beautiful precious day of Finn a Baby Shark lover just as our children and his Family. Enjoy the daily life of the Bebefinn Family filled with joyful songs.

programme.sub-title: S00 : E01 Pinkfong & Hogi Mini-Movie: The Tricky Three Cars
programme.desc: Join Hogi on a fun-filled adventure! When the Tricky Three Cars take Pinkfong and Wonderstar friends away, it's up to Hogi to save the day! Follow Hogi on a thrilling journey of courage and friendship. Can Hogi bring the friends back home safely?

programme.title: Best Dinosaur Songs
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Best Dinosaur Songs
programme.desc: There's Tyrannosaurus-Rex, the best hunter and Pachycephalosaurus.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Episode 1
programme.desc: Hogi visits the magical library, and is attracted to a mysterious book.. The adventure begins!

programme.title: Let's Booksplore with Hogi-Space
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Episode 2
programme.desc: What happens in the library at night? Colorful books are flying all over there! Let's booksplore with Hogi.

programme.title: Hogi's Story Theater
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Episode 5
programme.desc: You're watching Hogi's Story Theater compilation, an educational and interactive series prepared to you by Pinkfong & Hogi!

programme.title: Pinkfong Chart Show
programme.sub-title: S02 : E05 Who is the Strongest
programme.desc: All the strong friends have gathered! Lion King of Animals, Tyrannosaurus King of Dinosaurs, Shark Hunters of the Seas! It is said that strong friends gather and compete to see who has the most strength. Who will be the first place in the Strong Friends contest? Learn what true power is with Pinkfong!

programme.desc: Songs you really like but are a bit too embarrassed to admit. Don't worry, we're all in the same boat here & Pat urges you to try to have a little less shame in your musical game!

programme.title: Hits That Missed!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Hits That Missed!
programme.desc: Lesser known songs you may have forgotten from artists you'll certainly know!

programme.title: The NOW 100 of the 80s!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 The NOW 100 of the 80s!
programme.desc: Mark Goodier with a definitive countdown of the 100 biggest acts of the 80s - compiled using record sales, concert tickets, awards & more - from the UK, the USA & around the world!

programme.title: Ladies In Red! Top 10
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Ladies In Red! Top 10
programme.desc: Seems like red was the colour to be seen in during the 80s. Here are 10 of our favourite videos - and you'll not be surprised to know we start with Chris De Burgh!

programme.title: Long Hot Summer!

programme.desc: All 80s - 24/7 - the feelgood pop decade where the Brits invaded the world!

programme.title: Jenny Powell's 80s Summer!

programme.desc: Deluxe Lounge - the relaxed sound for a good feeling. Your time, your break: to come down, take a deep breath and take a break. Urbanauts, lounge lizards meet lounge-like tracks and smooth bar-grooves - the lounge mix. Head off, music on!.

programme.title: Together We Rise
programme.desc: A tribute to the global brotherhood that refuses to fit in. This collection celebrates the unity that turns fans into a tribe. In this pit, no one stands alone—together, we are the loudest force on earth.

programme.title: Endless Heavyness
programme.desc: Dive into pure power and unrelenting energy. Endless Heavyness is a non-stop wall of sound designed to hit hard and stay loud. No pauses, no compromises—just the most massive tracks to keep the momentum going. It’s not just loud; it’s eternal.

programme.title: Where Heavy Music Lives
programme.desc: Your official gateway to the underground. Discover your first distorted riff or find a circle of peers who "get it." Welcome to the neighborhood—it’s loud, it’s proud, and there’s always room for one more.

programme.title: Metal That Rocks
programme.desc: Where rock 'n' roll swagger meets the weight of metal. This collection bridges the gap, featuring everything from anthemic hard rock to core-shaking classics. It’s loud, it’s proud, and it’s built to move you.

programme.title: Bay Area Godfathers
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Bay Area Godfathers II
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live in London - 30th Anniversary Concert
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: From The Scene For The Scene
programme.desc: Go beyond the music and into the heart of the underground. This collection pairs heavy-hitting videos with exclusive band interviews and reports from metal capitals worldwide. Built by the scene, for the scene.

programme.title: Finnish Metal Special
programme.desc: From the frozen North comes a sound of haunting melodies and raw intensity. Dive into Finland’s finest, where melancholic atmospheres meet the power of the thousand lakes. It’s a masterclass in darkness and ice-cold riffs.

programme.title: The Home of Heavy
programme.desc: Step into the headquarters for everything that shakes the earth. From the pillars of the classics to the pioneers of the new era, this is where the heart of metal beats loudest. This is where you belong.

programme.title: Night Time Metal
programme.desc: The sun is down, the filters are off, and the real chaos begins. Brace yourself for the raw, uncensored side of the scene too heavy for daylight. This is the unfiltered truth of the underground. Adult ears only.

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live in London - 40th Anniversary Concert
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Your Pulse Of Metal
programme.desc: Sync your heartbeat to the complex rhythms of the underground. This collection dives into technical mastery and hidden gems that push your adrenaline. If you’re ready to feel the music in your veins, we’ve got the tracks.

programme.title: For Metalheads Only
programme.desc: Leave the rock anthems at the door—this is 100% pure steel. We’ve dialed the distortion to eleven for a lineup strictly for the heavy-duty fans. No compromises, no fillers, just total sonic devastation.

programme.title: Heavy Pumping
programme.desc: Ditch the pre-workout and let the riffs do the heavy lifting. This high-octane blast of speed and power is designed to fuel your gains or ignite a living room mosh pit. High BPMs, crushing drums, and zero excuses.

programme.title: New Rock And Metal Videos For You
programme.desc: Stay ahead of the curve with the freshest drops from the global underground. From world premieres to the latest studio masterpieces, we’ve gathered the newest sonic assaults in one place. If it’s loud and new, it’s here.

programme.title: Flying V
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E15 Lebanese Culinary Favourites
programme.desc: What better way to start a meal than with dessert? Lebanese home cook Jasmin Ibrahim shows us how to make a gooey cheese pastry doused in sweet syrup called Knafeh. With a buttery golden-brown crust, oozy melted cheese and fragrant rose water, this decadent dessert will surely satisfy your sweet tooth. Next on the menu, a Lebanese classic - pita bread. You'll never buy it from the store again with this delightfully easy recipe! Jasmin then prepares a well-known Lebanese sandwich - you guessed it, Shawarma! Loaded with charred chicken, a popular Lebanese 7 spice mix, and yummy garlic sauce, this might be the best sandwich ever! Finally, Jasmin cooks up a batch of tasty Beirut Spicy Fish - a recipe that comes from Lebanon's capital.

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 Peru + Lebanon
programme.desc: Tiraditos! No, it's not a joyous exclamation (even though it sounds a little like one...) it's a Peruvian dish that lands somewhere between traditional Peruvian ceviche and Japanese sashimi. Chef Craig Wong's version is made with swordfish and includes sweet potatoes pureed with spicy Aji Amarillo chilies. For his Lebanese tribute, check out Lamb Neck cured and slow-poached in olive oil for a melt-in- your-mouth result, paired with an intense, flavourful Black Baba Ghanoush made with charred eggplant and caramelized onions. For a common ingredient, it is two takes on potato: Lomo Saltado with grilled flank steak, and a cheese, herb, olive oil and lemon drenched Hasselback Batata Harra. Squab is on the final plate blending Lebanese flavours like sumac, pomegranate, and pistachio with Peruvian ones like sweet corn, squash, and lime. What a CombiNation!

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E21 All Sorts of Spice
programme.desc: Spices are extremely important to Lebanese cuisine and host Jasmin Ibrahim uses a ton of them in four tasty Lebanese dishes. First, she prepares two classic, aromatic toppings for a Lebanese breakfast bread called Mana- keesh. Next up, juicy chicken and smokey freekah seasoned with sweet cinnamon, citrusy cardamom, pungent all spice, and black peppercorns. This dish captures the essence of Lebanese cuisine. Moving on, Jasmin then makes a thick and spicy beef stew. It's eaten vermicelli rice and seasoned with a classic Lebanese 7-spice combo. Fragrant and delicious, this dish can be served family-style for everyone to enjoy! For dessert, Jasmin whips up a wonderfully rich batch of Spiced Rice Pudding and adds some frothy Spiced Coffee to complement.

programme.title: Cook the Books
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 A Generous Meal
programme.desc: Chef-host Shahir Massoud tries out recipes from an award-winning cookbook: A Generous Meal by his culinary school classmate, Christine Flynn! Follow along as Shahir makes craveable pumpkin stuffed shells, a juicy porkchop with fennel slaw, a refreshing peach and corn salad, and much more!

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E06 Cantonese Seafood
programme.desc: Bring on the seafood! Home cook Mary Tang kicks off this episode of One World Kitchen 3 with a unique dish featuring chewy clams, sweet and bitter fermented black beans, and a collection of spices. Next, she makes us her favourite shrimp dish - Shrimp and Egg Fried Rice. Fluffy egg bits, lightly flavoured nutty brown rice, and a pop of tender shrimp works wonders for the taste buds. A common appetizer, Mary then walks us through a spicy concoction of deep-fried salt and pepper squid or Calamari. And who doesn't love lobster? Mary finishes off with Cantonese Lobster with Ginger and Scallions (yes, it tastes as good as it sounds!). A Cantonese take on the juicy protein, this dish is fried in hot bubbling oil for a golden-brown crust, and steamed in great Shaoxing wine and salty soy sauce for some flavour.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E13 Balancing Sweet with Savoury
programme.desc: A tasty four-course Vietnamese meal using fruit? Yes, please! For her first dish, talented home cook Lisa Nguyen uses tangy tamarind pulp to balance flavours in a savoury bowl of Vietnamese Sour Fish Soup. Then, she combines tart pomelo and sweet pineapple with juicy crab meat for a flavourful salad. Next up, hot Chicken Coconut Curry with a hint of citrusy lemongrass, sweet potatoes, and a kaffir lime leaf. Pair it with a warm, toasty baguette and you're good to go! Lisa's last dish is a mouth-watering, classic Vietnamese dessert. Soft and chewy Steamed Banana Cake drizzled in a sweet velvety coconut sauce crunchy sesame seeds will have you begging for more!

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E20 Lebanese Small Plates
programme.desc: Talented home cook Jasmin Ibrahim prepares delicious, sharable small plates in this episode of One World Kitchen. First on the menu, Grilled Lamb Skewers. Wonderfully charred and seasoned with sweet cinnamon, potent all-spice, and a punch of garlic, these lamb skewers will be the hype at your next family get-together! Then, Jasmin makes a famous Lebanese classic - Falafel and Hummus (so tasty!). Next up, savoury Zucchini Fritters with a zesty yogurt sauce are added to the mix for a little dinner party pizzazz. Finally, Jasmin's favourite cheese is the star of this next dish - Grilled Halloumi. Served with a sweet and citrusy rose drink, this small plate will have your guests going crazy!

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E27 Cheese with Every Meal!
programme.desc: Cheese - a staple in traditional Greek cuisine! Talented home cook Joanna Chery fries up two delicious ap- petizers called Saganaki, both featuring two different types of cheese. First, she fries up kefaltyri, a hard, salty cheese in a dramatic burning flame of ouzo (licorice-flavoured alcohol) - Opa! Then, Joanna shows us a popular Fried Shrimp and Cheese appetizer using tasty feta and tender shrimp. Pair both dishes with a Greek rustic bread and you've nailed it! Next up, Joanna prepares a Greek classic - Spanakopita. This mouth-watering dish is made up of creamy ricotta, crispy phyllo pastry, fresh spinach, and a hint of dill (yum!). Moving on, Joanna showcases her all-time favourite Greek meal - Pastisio. For dessert, cheesy sweet tarts called Melitinia Cookies. Commonly served at parties, these ooey-gooey mascarpone-filled creations are to die for!

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Flowers!
programme.desc: Flowers aren't just for smelling - they're great for baking too! Host Jessica McGovern shows us how to bake some tasty desserts with a floral twist.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 All About Eggs
programme.desc: Host Jessica McGovern shows us the versatility of eggs by baking up some tasty, egg-centric desserts like CrÃ¨me Brulee and Lemon Meringue Pie.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Comfort Food
programme.desc: Baking host Jessica McGovern warms up the kitchen with some melty, creamy, and chewy treats to comfort you on a rainy day.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Rich and Delicious
programme.desc: Baking is indulgent - especially when making rich and delicious treats! Host Jessica McGovern shares some foolproof recipes for all things rich.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E23 Noodles and Nectarines
programme.desc: For this "N" challenge, Chef Lauren Gulyas works with noodles and nectarines. For her first dish, Lauren cooks up a breaded nectarine and mozzarella stack. Talking technique, she shows us how to cut nectarines into rounds. She does the same with some soft mozzarella and then walks us through the art of a balsamic reduction. For the noodles, Chef Lauren puts an elegant twist on your childhood favourite with a lobster mac and cheese. She spares no flavours, adding fried bacon, garlic, cayenne pepper, mustard powder, and even dry vermouth. This is no ordinary noodle dish. But now for the real challenge! Chef Lauren works with the noodles and nectarines.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 Okra and Oats
programme.desc: In this episode, Chef Robert Jewell explores recipes using two very different ingredients that start with the letter "O," oats and okra. For his first dish, Robert uses okra in a classic cornmeal cake recipe, but bumps up the flavour factor with spicy jalapenos. Robert balances the heat of the jalapeno with a tart green tomato and crunchy red onion salsa. In his next recipe, Robert keeps the heat, but switches up his recipes for a curry-spiced oat pancake. This Indian inspired dish needs something to cool it down and Robert knows exactly what that is - sweet, silky applesauce! He's up for the challenge when it comes to combining okra and oats into one dish, and the results are tasty!

programme.title: VegHeadz
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Summer
programme.desc: Nothing screams summer more than salsa, especially chef Pino's sunshine yellow salsa served with grilled halloumi cheese. Yes, please! Next up, snappy snow peas pair with summer strawberries in a sprouted quinoa salad with Champagne vinaigrette! Pino then takes summer sunbathing to the next level, serving up blistered Shishito peppers and buttery radishes with sesame seeds and edible seaweed! For his final dish, Pino sums up summer with a French-style ratatouille served as a salad! Thinly sliced vegetables are lightly marinated before pairing with a fresh carrot purée in a dish that sparkles with summer.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E15 Lebanese Culinary Favourites
programme.desc: What better way to start a meal than with dessert? Lebanese home cook Jasmin Ibrahim shows us how to make a gooey cheese pastry doused in sweet syrup called Knafeh. Loaded with charred chicken, a popular Lebanese 7 spice mix, and yummy garlic sauce, this might be the best sandwich ever! Finally, Jasmin cooks up a batch of tasty Beirut Spicy Fish - a recipe that comes from Lebanon's capital.

Follow along as Shahir makes craveable pumpkin stuffed shells, a juicy porkchop with fennel slaw, a refreshing peach and corn salad, and much more!

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.sub-title: S06 : E05 White Fish Episode with Chef Katie Ardington
programme.desc: Skilled Chef Katie Ardington is excited to introduce her favourite fish, striped sea bass, in this fabulous voyage through the 7 seas of seafood cookery.

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.sub-title: S06 : E06 Chicken Episode with Chef Natalia Machado
programme.desc: Chef-host Natalia Machado loves chicken, and who doesn't? Chicken is enjoyed around the world for good reason; it is versatile and reliably delicious!

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.sub-title: S06 : E07 Salad Episode with Chef Craig Wong
programme.desc: Salad is a wonderful addition to any meal, and sometimes even a meal on its own"... today, the talented Chef Craig Wong shares several of his superior salad ideas.

programme.title: Cook Like A Chef
programme.sub-title: S06 : E08 Pork Episode with Chef Derek Dammann
programme.desc: Snout to tail cooking is Chef Derek Dammann's specialty, in this episode celebrating pork, he cooks everything but the squeal!

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Honey, Cherries, Garlic Scapes and Carrots

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.sub-title: S01 : E21 Breakfast for Dinner
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make breakfast for dinner for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: a veggie frittata, sweet and peppery bacon, a cottage cheese pancake stack, and fruit skewers!

programme.title: VegHeadz
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Summer
programme.desc: Nothing screams summer more than salsa, especially chef Pino's sunshine yellow salsa served with grilled halloumi cheese. Yes, please! Next up, snappy snow peas pair with summer strawberries in a sprouted quinoa salad with Champagne vinaigrette! Pino then takes summer sunbathing to the next level, serving up blistered Shishito peppers and buttery radishes with sesame seeds and edible seaweed! For his final dish, Pino sums up summer with a French-style ratatouille served as a salad! Thinly sliced vegetables are lightly marinated before pairing with a fresh carrot purée in a dish that sparkles with summer.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E15 Lebanese Culinary Favourites
programme.desc: What better way to start a meal than with dessert? Lebanese home cook Jasmin Ibrahim shows us how to make a gooey cheese pastry doused in sweet syrup called Knafeh. With a buttery golden-brown crust, oozy melted cheese and fragrant rose water, this decadent dessert will surely satisfy your sweet tooth. Next on the menu, a Lebanese classic - pita bread. You'll never buy it from the store again with this delightfully easy recipe! Jasmin then prepares a well-known Lebanese sandwich - you guessed it, Shawarma! Loaded with charred chicken, a popular Lebanese 7 spice mix, and yummy garlic sauce, this might be the best sandwich ever! Finally, Jasmin cooks up a batch of tasty Beirut Spicy Fish - a recipe that comes from Lebanon's capital.

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 Peru + Lebanon
programme.desc: Tiraditos! No, it's not a joyous exclamation (even though it sounds a little like one...) it's a Peruvian dish that lands somewhere between traditional Peruvian ceviche and Japanese sashimi. Chef Craig Wong's version is made with swordfish and includes sweet potatoes pureed with spicy Aji Amarillo chilies. For his Lebanese tribute, check out Lamb Neck cured and slow-poached in olive oil for a melt-in- your-mouth result, paired with an intense, flavourful Black Baba Ghanoush made with charred eggplant and caramelized onions. For a common ingredient, it is two takes on potato: Lomo Saltado with grilled flank steak, and a cheese, herb, olive oil and lemon drenched Hasselback Batata Harra. Squab is on the final plate blending Lebanese flavours like sumac, pomegranate, and pistachio with Peruvian ones like sweet corn, squash, and lime. What a CombiNation!

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E21 All Sorts of Spice
programme.desc: Spices are extremely important to Lebanese cuisine and host Jasmin Ibrahim uses a ton of them in four tasty Lebanese dishes. First, she prepares two classic, aromatic toppings for a Lebanese breakfast bread called Mana- keesh. Next up, juicy chicken and smokey freekah seasoned with sweet cinnamon, citrusy cardamom, pungent all spice, and black peppercorns. This dish captures the essence of Lebanese cuisine. Moving on, Jasmin then makes a thick and spicy beef stew. It's eaten vermicelli rice and seasoned with a classic Lebanese 7-spice combo. Fragrant and delicious, this dish can be served family-style for everyone to enjoy! For dessert, Jasmin whips up a wonderfully rich batch of Spiced Rice Pudding and adds some frothy Spiced Coffee to complement.

programme.title: Cook the Books
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 A Generous Meal
programme.desc: Chef-host Shahir Massoud tries out recipes from an award-winning cookbook: A Generous Meal by his culinary school classmate, Christine Flynn! Follow along as Shahir makes craveable pumpkin stuffed shells, a juicy porkchop with fennel slaw, a refreshing peach and corn salad, and much more!

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 Shrimp and Sausage
programme.desc: It's all about the letter "S" as Chef Robert Jewell cooks up tasty meals using shrimp and sausage. For his first recipe, Robert fries up turmeric-spiced sweet potato fritters with a shrimp centre. He takes this tantalizing appetizer to another level with a savoury lime soy dipping sauce. Next up, Robert makes an English breakfast strata. This sausage casserole is easily the BEST way to start your day. He layers the bottom of the dish with buttered sourdough slices, before adding crispy fried sausages, leeks and tomatoes. He then covers it in a creamy egg mixture, crumbles stilton on top and bakes it to golden brown. Finally, Robert combines shrimp and sausage into one flavourful dish.

programme.title: Flour Power

programme.desc: Baking host Jessica McGovern warms up the kitchen with some melty, creamy, and chewy treats to comfort you on a rainy day.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Rich and Delicious
programme.desc: Baking is indulgent - especially when making rich and delicious treats! Host Jessica McGovern shares some foolproof recipes for all things rich.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E23 Noodles and Nectarines
programme.desc: For this "N" challenge, Chef Lauren Gulyas works with noodles and nectarines. For her first dish, Lauren cooks up a breaded nectarine and mozzarella stack. Talking technique, she shows us how to cut nectarines into rounds. She does the same with some soft mozzarella and then walks us through the art of a balsamic reduction. For the noodles, Chef Lauren puts an elegant twist on your childhood favourite with a lobster mac and cheese. She spares no flavours, adding fried bacon, garlic, cayenne pepper, mustard powder, and even dry vermouth. This is no ordinary noodle dish. But now for the real challenge! Chef Lauren works with the noodles and nectarines.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 Okra and Oats
programme.desc: In this episode, Chef Robert Jewell explores recipes using two very different ingredients that start with the letter "O," oats and okra. For his first dish, Robert uses okra in a classic cornmeal cake recipe, but bumps up the flavour factor with spicy jalapenos. Robert balances the heat of the jalapeno with a tart green tomato and crunchy red onion salsa. In his next recipe, Robert keeps the heat, but switches up his recipes for a curry-spiced oat pancake. This Indian inspired dish needs something to cool it down and Robert knows exactly what that is - sweet, silky applesauce! He's up for the challenge when it comes to combining okra and oats into one dish, and the results are tasty!

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E16 Beef and Buttermilk
programme.desc: Culinary expert Theresa Visintin picks the letter "B" and must combine beef with buttermilk for her challenge. But first, she works with the ingredients separately. Silky buttermilk lends itself perfectly to Theresa's battered blooming onion recipe. Using the biggest onion she can find, Theresa skillfully slices from the root down, ensuring it will bloom into a beautiful flower. She coats the Vidalia onion in egg, buttermilk and smoky spiced flour, before deep frying it. Next up, it's time for beef to get the Theresa treatment, as she prepares a crowd favourite- smoky, juicy, fall-off-thebone baked beef brisket. With the perfect balance of sweet and spicy, this meal will make you look forward to leftovers...if there are any! Now for the challenge - Theresa skillfully blends beef with buttermilk in a recipe that will tempt your taste buds.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E24 Maple and Mahi-Mahi
programme.desc: After picking "M" for this episode's challenge, Chef Lauren Gulyas decides to make meal magic using maple and mahi-mahi. She starts by combining chestnut and quinoa to create a mouth-watering medley, rich in flavour and texture. Chef Lauren adds shiitake mushrooms and drizzles the dish with a balsamic vinegar, maple syrup and rosemary dressing. Next up, she steams Mahi-mahi with red chilies and lemongrass, this savoury spice is a heavenly combination with an invigorating aroma. For the challenge, Chef Lauren seamlessly introduces both maple and mahimahi into one flavourful fusion.

programme.title: Room To Improve - Dermot's Home
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Room To Improve - Dermot's Home
programme.desc: As it turns out, the only predictable thing about this build are delays caused by Dermot's obsessive attention to detail.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: This week Dermot is in Glasnevin with Terry and Peadar Clarke and their two children Marie Bernadette and Luke.

programme.title: Room To Improve - Dermot's Home
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Room To Improve - Dermot's Home
programme.desc: Dermot's vision for the house is mirrored by similarly grandiose ambitions for the garden - a wild jungle whose design he hands over to landscaper Diarmuid Gavin.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Architect Dermot Bannon faces a tough challenge in meeting the design brief and budgetary restraints for the Zambra family who are building an extension in Castleknock.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: This week, Dermot Bannon helps a couple in Enniscorthy renovate an old cottage and prepare their home for a new baby.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: In this week's programme, the penultimate of the series, Dermot finds himself the dream job.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: This week, Podge and Jo Ussher want to turn their Wexford cottage from a holiday home into their permanent home without sacrificing any of its 1930s charm.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: They bought their home at the end of the property boom and now it's worth less than they paid for it.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Timahoe, Portlaoise with Dolores and Donal O'Connell. Their five children are all grown-up but still live in the area.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S02 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Cathy and Michael Keane bought their house when it was being used as a cowshed. They converted it, had four children and over the years Dad, Michael, has added on bits to it.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Declan and Judy Cadwell from Clontarf share a small terraced home with their three sons, Christopher 19, Ross 17 and Jake 13. But only just.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S02 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Marie Duffy moved into her Victorian townhouse off the South Circular Road four years ago. Her friends all thought she was mad to buy it because there was so much work to be done.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot encounters a stumbling block or two when he turns his hand to a badly laid out bungalow in Co Offaly.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot revamps a Rathfarnham four-bed to suit the changing needs of its occupants Peter, Lisa and their twins Grace and Louise (9) live in a four-bed house in Rathfarnham, Dublin 14.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 Room to Improve
programme.desc: A young couple with three children seek Dermot's help in revamping their small three bedroomed bungalow in Ballinteer Ailish and Patrick Bates are a young couple running out of space - fast!

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot knows exactly how to solve the problem but it means destroying a lot of the work the couple have already done.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Childhood sweethearts are up against the clock to revamp their 70s bungalow in Enniskerry before their first baby arrives.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot needs to create "a bungalow downstairs" incorporating a bedroom, bathroom, kitchen, living and dining room.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is normally confident about presenting a plan. But with a couple as design-literate as Greg and Siobhan, the stakes are that bit higher.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Rathcoole with Mary Moore, the design solution Dermot offers Mary is one of the most unusual and interesting he has ever conceived.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Architect Dermot Bannon sets out to transform people's living spaces. Before moving into their 1940s ex-council house in Co Kilkenny, the Kirwans added a basic extension.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E07 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot wants to turn the house completely on its head, putting the bedrooms to the front and extending the back to include a kitchen, living and dining that leads into the garden.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E08 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Templetuohy, Co. Tipperary with Joanne and Sean Cleere who believe they need a substantial extension but Dermot doesn't actually concur.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Room to Improve starts with Margaret and Jodie Burke who plan to renovate the family home in Foxrock.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Pádraig Whooley and Lorraine Dufficey spent 265 thousand euros on their remote cottage at Rossmore in West Cork, they knew that - while the hilltop location was ideal - the house was far from it.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Laytown, co.Meath, with a budget of 60,000 euros, Dermot's worry "is even if you took away the shoddy workmanship you'd spend the 60k, this is a really difficult one..."

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Dalkey, with a budget of 180,000 euros, he must come up with an innovative design to match their exacting requirements within the confines of an incredibly tight site.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Clontarf, with Denise and Ben who desperately want a second bathroom for their family home, but their budget is limited.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Tullow, with Tom and Lisa who want to renovate their 19th century farmhouse.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E07 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Yvonne and John live in a housing estate in Dundalk with their two children. Four years ago, they decided to buy their next-door neighbours house.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E08 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Jim and Siobhan Doyle live in a beautiful old house over looking Dublin Bay in Sutton. See Dermot Bannon transform the rambling old house into a beautiful new space.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S05 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: The series begins in Cork City with our youngest and most ambitious couple yet, Meadhbh and Niall, both 27-years-old.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S05 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: After 10 successful years living in Boston, Elaine Mitchell made the decision to come back to the old sod with her earnings.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S05 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: No close neighbours, beautiful views of the Wicklow Mountains, a large vegetable patch, 10 hens, four ducks, two geese, four beehives, two dogs and three cats.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S05 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Marcus and Margaret are about to extend a two-bed cottage in Dundrum and share it with Marcus's beloved Aunt May.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S05 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: The number one criteria when buying a house is location and our fifth programme of the series is set in one of the most sought after costal parts of the country, Dalkey.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S05 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: John Rochford from Dublin and Lee Benn, originally from Limerick, have bought a house in their dream location - South Dublin's seaside suburbia, Blackrock.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S06 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot Bannon helps a family to transform their 70s bungalow outside Tipperary into a modern family home.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S06 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: This week Dermot goes to Cork to work with a family spanning three generations - who all have different ideas on how to improve their home.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S06 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot Bannon tries to turn a dilapidated, woodworm infested 1930s cottage into a starter home for a Finglas family.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S06 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: This week Dermot tackles a large Victorian terraced house in the highly sought-after Dublin suburb of Donnybrook.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S07 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: The first in the season will see Catherine Bennett and her youngest daughter Sarah Jane keen to downsize from their huge 13-bedroomed house in Mullingar. They're planning to move down the road, where they also own a 3-bed bungalow that's been uninhabited for the last nine years.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S07 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot faces a unique challenge in Clane, Co. Kildare.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S07 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Architect Dermot Bannon helps Senator Katherine Zappone and Dr Ann Louise Gilligan renovate a dilapidated hunting lodge in Brittas, Dublin.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S07 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Desperate for more space, a couple with two young daughters, who have long since outgrown their tiny cottage in Killawalla outside Westport, engage Dermot to help.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S07 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: New Yorker Ursula and accountant Jimmy from Ennis enlist Dermot's help with their colossal house in Firhouse, Dublin

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S07 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Clare Heenan and Rory Kelly live in a compact 1950's bungalow in the south Dublin suburb of Stillorgan. Long time renters, the couple struggled for years to afford this house. It's their first home but with a series of small, disjointed rooms and a damp, grotty extension - it's far from ideal...

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: In the ten years since they first met Avril and Andrew Wilson-Rankin have been dreaming of owning their own home. Now they've bought a property in Dun Laoghaire south county Dublin but it's as far from being a home, or even a house, as you could imagine.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Jean Robinson and Daithi Elliffe have bought themselves what they hope will be an ideal family home in a unique location - a listed 19th century former schoolhouse at Kilternan with spectacular views of the Dublin mountains, but all is not as it appears.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Struggling with a tight schedule, a limited budget and the traditionalist taste of his clients, can Dermot balance their love of classic farmhouse design with his own vision of clean urban functionality?

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: This week, Dermot wants to create a wheelchair friendly house in Malahide that's also a welcoming family home.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Sally-Ann, her husband Trevor, and their four children live in Sally-Ann's childhood home - a huge, distinctive 1970s architect-designed home outside Mullingar in Westmeath that they've dreamed of rennovating for years.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Since they married two years ago, Paul and Sabina Horgan have become the proud parents of baby Mia and the owners of a property on the North Dublin coast: Lismara - a dilapidated 1940s cottage in Portmarnock in an extremely poor condition.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E07 Room to Improve
programme.desc: GP, writer and budding musician Dr Pat Harrold, his wife Marita, a physiotherapist, and their four kids returned to Pat's home town of Nenagh 10 years ago and they have been looking for a place to call home ever since.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E08 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Leonard and Caroline live in house once owned by Leonard's grandparents in the south Dublin suburb of Dundrum - a 1960s three-bed semi that hasn't changed at all since the couple bought it two years ago.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S09 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: At the village of Puckaun in north Tipperary, teachers Darragh Egan, his partner Sarah Lovett and their three month old son Donagh are moving home. What could be simpler or more straightforward? Well, as it turns out, quite a lot. Home is the 1960s bungalow where Darragh grew up - built on the site of the old village school by his late father Jim and currently occupied by his 70 year old mother.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S09 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Airline pilot Ian Callaghan has bought a 1930s Victorian house in his hometown of Drogheda, County Louth, which he and his girlfriend Claire Moore are keen to call home. Though full of charm and period features, the house is in dire need of renovation. Enter: architect Dermot Bannon with an innovative plan to retain the building's century-old ambience while adding a radical modern extension.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S09 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Last year, Aoife from Sutton and her wife Mel from New Zealand bought themselves a three bed semi in Baldoyle north Dublin - a tiny house in a spectacular bayside location. With incredible, unobstructed views of the sea and Portmarnock golf course, they've been hoping to renovate the house to suit its superb location ever since.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S09 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: This week Dermot is in Maynooth. Seven years ago, George and Sinead Mullis fell in love in with the Coach house - an 1850s building on half an acre of the historic former Carton Estate in Maynooth. In 2014, they bought the place for just half of its former asking price and moved in with their two year old son Daniel. But what seemed like their dream home soon turned out to be anything but.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S09 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: A special edition of the show where Dermot revisits three of his favourite builds from earlier series: the Longford publicans he convinced the embrace the void, a couple moving home from California to Bishopstown and 14 year old Michael's wheelchair accessible semi-d in Malahide.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Robbie and Julie from Darndale in North Dublin have saved for over 20 years to buy the house of their dreams - a 1940s cottage in the picturesque north Dublin suburb of Malahide. With a budget of 180K, Dermot's clients plan to gut the cottage, doubling its size with a spacious new two-storey extension to the rear, but the remediation costs are high.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Farmer and Boatbuilder Enda and his wife Mags live on a 55 acre Brussel Sprout farm at Balheary near Swords in North Dublin. After three decades of life in the country, they're moving back to Enda's home town - the picturesque seaside village of Rush. Their new home, formerly owned by Enda's aunt is an old fisherman's house near the harbour.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Moate in County Westmeath, is a place where football is part sport, part religion. On an overgrown plot on the outskirts of town lies the abandoned future home of county GAA All Star Dessie Dolan, his wife Kelly and their 3-year-old son Nathan. They have bought themselves a dilapidated cottage on a hopelessly exposed site in the village.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: At Sutton in North Dublin, Dermot extends a 1960s suburban house, changing a beloved childhood home into a sumptuous new one for Hannah, James and their twin sons. To give the couple the 'wow factor' they've asked for, Dermot designs a large L-shaped extension at the rear of the house with a soaring mezzanine level.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Having rented a house in Navan for the last two years, teacher Celine and sound engineer Dave are excited at the prospect of moving to a farmhouse once owned by her grandparents at Kildalkey village in County Meath where Celine grew up. The couple will be the fourth generation to live there and retaining the charm and character of the old place is a major concern for the whole family.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: In the three years since newlyweds Rosie and Keith bought their five-bed house in Templeogue, Dublin 6, they haven't changed a thing. From the dark, cold interiors to the cavity block, flat roofed extension, this house is a relic of 1970s design, with décor to match. Keen to create a unique take on the rather unimaginative suburban semi, Dermot designs a radical, steep-roofed extension...

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Country and Irish legend Daniel O'Donnell and his wife Majella share a large four bed detached home in Kincasslagh West Donegal. Unlike Daniel, who's fairly happy with the place, Majella is keen to upgrade and reconfigure the interior. With her husband on tour, she's determined to get the very best from her architect.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Nine years ago, Susie and Dave bought their dream home on the outskirts of Fermoy in Cork - a 170 year old three storey mansion that Susie has admired since she was a teenager. The house however, has begun to show its age and Susie and Dave want to extend and upgrade to create the ultimate family home.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: IT manager Christine has bought herself a red brick terraced house in Clontarf, North Dublin. Christine has big plans for the place but as Dermot quickly discovers, they're far bigger than her 130K budget will allow. And despite his best efforts, Dermot is unable to convince Christine to modify her 25 page wish list.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: At the seaside village of Portrane in North Dublin, Dermot creates a workable home for three generations of the one family under the watchful, budget-conscious eyes of two sisters.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Recently returned to Ireland after 12 years in London, new parents website designer Cliona and IT manager Micheal have already spent 30 grand renovating a 1950s semi-D at Killester in North Dublin in their own distinctive, industrial style.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dairy farmer Padraig and schoolteacher Katie are hoping to create their 'forever' home by renovating a century-old farmhouse on a half acre of land recently inherited from Padraig's uncle. But delivering this dream won't be easy for their architect. Dermot's problems begin when he presents his initial design and it Katie announces that she has no time for 'open plan' living.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E07 Room to Improve
programme.desc: At a 1960s 'Semi D' in Stillorgan, Dermot's vision of a million euro 'Malibu style' house for Rory and Lorna from the west of Ireland descends into an ongoing battle over the style and position of the front door.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S12 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: David and Nessa Conlon have just bought this 1990s split level detached bungalow and plan to move in with their three children (twin boys aged 11 and a 7 year old girl) once the renovations have been completed.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S12 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: In the second episode of Room To Improve, Dermot Bannon heads to Borrisoleigh, Co. Tipperary, to meet Joe Kenny and his bride to be Mary Hayes. Joe's house is a 3 bedroom, 2 storey house on a half acre site about half a mile from Borrisoleigh, with beautiful views of green fields. Mary and Joe are creating their dream home, to move into just after their wedding. Joe has lived the bachelor life up until now and his house reflects this. Dermot can see exactly why Mary is insisting on a redesign.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S12 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: In the third episode of Room To Improve, Dermot Bannon heads to Rathfarnham, where Yvonne and Adrian Saunders live with their daughter Lauren. Yvonne and Adrian's house is a detached 1950s two-bedroom property, in need of massive transformation. Dermot likens it to a 'Hansel and Gretel' house.

programme.title: Flying Over Maui
programme.desc: Soaring high above Maui, Hawaii's exotic coastline and lush interior.

programme.title: Superbloom Soaring
